title: Capital Association of Disability Examiners (CADE) — Bylaws (Washington, D.C.)
description: Bylaws of the Capital Association of Disability Examiners (CADE), the Washington, D.C. (District of Columbia) chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), within the Mid-Atlantic Region. Articles I-IX cover name, purpose, composition (all persons working in the District of Columbia involved in administering/processing the Social Security disability program), membership, the Executive Committee (President/Vice-President/Secretary-Treasurer plus appointed Membership Chairman and NADE Advocate Reporter; President serves as Mid-Atlantic Region Board representative), monthly meetings, committees, parliamentary authority, and amendments. Includes an unfilled approval/signature block referencing the year 1988.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Capital (Washington, D.C.) Chapter
source.title: Bylaws of the Capital Association of Disability Examiners (CADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'DC-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (e.g. the title typo 'EXAMIERS', and escaped fill-in blanks rendered as '\_\_\_'). The document is a Bylaws document (no separately titled Constitution section) and carries an unexecuted approval block 'Approved this ___ day of ___, 1988', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 1988. The chapter serves Washington, D.C. despite the file being grouped under 'state-bylaws'. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
